name: Minutes
description: Local whisper.cpp audio transcription via the Minutes CLI

persistMemo.description: Save transcribed audio as a voice memo in ~/meetings/memos/. Set to false to transcribe without persisting.

minutesBin.description: Path to the minutes binary. Defaults to 'minutes' (must be in PATH) or the MINUTES_BIN env var.

language.description: Default transcription language code (e.g. 'en', 'es', 'fr'). Overridden per-request when the channel provides a language.

contentType.description: Content type passed to minutes process -t. Always 'memo' for voice notes.
